# orcasecurity_shift_left_policy_catalog_controls (Data Source)

Lists available AppSec policy controls from the Orca catalog API. Use this data source to discover valid control IDs when authoring policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "orcasecurity_shift_left_policy_catalog_controls" "iac" {
  type = "iac"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) Policy type to fetch controls for (e.g. iac, container_image, sast).

### Read-Only

- `controls` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--controls))

<a id="nestedatt--controls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `controls`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `priority` (String)
- `title` (String)
